{{Cite sources|date=2015年10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|sortkey=人1565年没}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kadenokōji Akitomi | image = | caption = | period = {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} | birth_date = {{ill|Entoku|ja|延徳}} 2, {{ill|February 5 (old calendar)|ja|2月5日}} ({{ill|1490|ja|1490年}} {{ill|February 24|ja|2月24日}}) | death_date = {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 8, {{ill|August 10 (old calendar)|ja|8月10日}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565年}} {{ill|September 4|ja|9月4日}}) | other_names = Initially Akihide (在秀) → Later Akitomi (在富) | rank = {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議}}, {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}} {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭}}, {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿}} | lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|ja|後柏原天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} | family = {{ill|Kamo Asomi clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji clan (Kamo clan)|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重}}, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷}} | siblings = Akitomi, {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康}} | spouse = Unknown | children = {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌}}, adopted sons: {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} }}
'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代}}. He held the ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家}}.
== Biography == Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀).
In {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 4 ({{ill|1507|ja|1507年}}), he received the rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔}}. By {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 9 ({{ill|1512|ja|1512年}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar}}, and in {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 11 ({{ill|1514|ja|1514年}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿}}.
In {{ill|Kyōroku|ja|享禄}} 4 ({{ill|1531|ja|1531年}}), Akitomi reached the rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年}} ({{ill|1536|ja|1536年}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年}} ({{ill|1551|ja|1551年}})—a first for his family.
However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559年}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年}}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565年}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}}

{{Cite sources|date=2015th year 10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|sortkey=人1565th year 没}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kadenokōji Akitomi | image = | caption = | period = {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代 (日本)}} | birth_date = {{ill|Entoku|ja|延徳}} 2, {{ill|February 5 (old calendar)|ja|2月5日}} ({{ill|1490|ja|1490th year }} {{ill|February 24|ja|2月24日}}) | death_date = {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 8, {{ill|August 10 (old calendar)|ja|8月10日}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year }} {{ill|September 4|ja|9月4日}}) | other_names = Initially Akihide (在秀) → Later Akitomi (在富) | rank = {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議}}, {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}} {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭}}, {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿}} | lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|ja|後柏原天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇}} | family = {{ill|Kamo Asomi clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji clan (Kamo clan)|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重}}, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷}} | siblings = Akitomi, {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康}} | spouse = Unknown | children = {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌}}, adopted sons: {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}} }}
'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|ja|陰陽師}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代}}. He held the ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家}}.
== Biography == Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀).
In {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 4 ({{ill|1507|ja|1507th year }}), he received the rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔}}. By {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 9 ({{ill|1512|ja|1512nd year }}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar}}, and in {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正}} 11 ({{ill|1514|ja|1514th year }}), he was also appointed {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿}}.
In {{ill|Kyōroku|ja|享禄}} 4 ({{ill|1531|ja|1531st year }}), Akitomi reached the rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5th year }} ({{ill|1536|ja|1536th year }}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year }} ({{ill|1551|ja|1551st year }})—a first for his family.
However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559th year }}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year }}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year }} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year }}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高}}
== References == {{Cite notes}} === Notes === {{Notelist2}} === Sources === {{Reflist|30em}}
== Further Reading == * {{Cite journal|和書|author=Arimichi Ebizawa|title=Manoel Akimasa and Kamo Akimasa|journal=Shien|publisher=Rikkyo University|volume=25|issue=3|year=1965|pages=37–46|doi=10.14992/00001009|url=https://doi.org/10.14992/00001009}} * {{Cite book|和書|author=Murayama Shūichi|title=The History of Onmyōdō in Japan|publisher=Hanawa Shobō|year=1981|isbn=4827310572}} * {{Cite web|和書|author=Tajima Arato|title=The Onmyōji of the Sengoku Period: Kamo Akimasa|url=https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%c0%ef%b9%f1%bb%fe%c2%e5%a4%ce%b1%a2%cd%db%bb%d5%a1%a7%b2%ec%cc%d0%ba%df%be%bb|accessdate=2019-10-6}}

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft}}
== References == {{Cite notes}} === Notes === {{Notelist2}} === Sources === {{Reflist|30em}}
== Further Reading == * {{Cite journal|和書|author=Arimichi Ebizawa|title=Manoel Akimasa and Kamo Akimasa|journal=Shien|publisher=Rikkyo University|volume=25|issue=3|year=1965|pages=37–46|doi=10.14992/00001009|url=https://doi.org/10.14992/00001009}} * {{Cite book|和書|author=Murayama Shūichi|title=The History of Onmyōdō in Japan|publisher=Hanawa Shobō|year=1981|isbn=4827310572}} * {{Cite web|和書|author=Tajima Arato|title=The Onmyōji of the Sengoku Period: Kamo Akimasa|url=https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%c0%ef%b9%f1%bb%fe%c2%e5%a4%ce%b1%a2%cd%db%bb%d5%a1%a7%b2%ec%cc%d0%ba%df%be%bb|accessdate=2019-10-6}}

{{Cite sources|date=2015th year 10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|sortkey=人1565th year 没}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kadenokōji Akitomi | image = | caption = | period = {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Entoku|ja|延徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 2, {{ill|February 5 (old calendar)|ja|2月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1490|ja|1490th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|February 24|ja|2月24日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | death_date = {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 8, {{ill|August 10 (old calendar)|ja|8月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 4|ja|9月4日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | other_names = Initially Akihide (在秀) → Later Akitomi (在富) | rank = {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}} | lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|ja|後柏原天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} | family = {{ill|Kamo Asomi clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji clan (Kamo clan)|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = Akitomi, {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}} | spouse = Unknown | children = {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, adopted sons: {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}} }}
'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held the ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Biography == Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀).
In {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1507|ja|1507th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he received the rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=draft|12=draft}}. By {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 ({{ill|1512|ja|1512nd year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 ({{ill|1514|ja|1514th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}}.
In {{ill|Kyōroku|ja|享禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1531|ja|1531st year|12=draft|12=draft}}), Akitomi reached the rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1551|ja|1551st year|12=draft|12=draft}})—a first for his family.
However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=draft|12=draft}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}}
== References == {{Cite notes}} === Notes === {{Notelist2}} === Sources === {{Reflist|30em}}
== Further Reading == * {{Cite journal|和書|author=Arimichi Ebizawa|title=Manoel Akimasa and Kamo Akimasa|journal=Shien|publisher=Rikkyo University|volume=25|issue=3|year=1965|pages=37–46|doi=10.14992/00001009|url=https://doi.org/10.14992/00001009}} * {{Cite book|和書|author=Murayama Shūichi|title=The History of Onmyōdō in Japan|publisher=Hanawa Shobō|year=1981|isbn=4827310572}} * {{Cite web|和書|author=Tajima Arato|title=The Onmyōji of the Sengoku Period: Kamo Akimasa|url=https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%c0%ef%b9%f1%bb%fe%c2%e5%a4%ce%b1%a2%cd%db%bb%d5%a1%a7%b2%ec%cc%d0%ba%df%be%bb|accessdate=2019-10-6}}

{{Cite sources|date=2015th year 10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|sortkey=人1565th year 没}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kadenokōji Akitomi | image = | caption = | period = {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Entoku|ja|延徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 2, {{ill|February 5 (old calendar)|ja|2月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1490|ja|1490th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|February 24|ja|2月24日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | death_date = {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 8, {{ill|August 10 (old calendar)|ja|8月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 4|ja|9月4日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | other_names = Initially Akihide (在秀) → Later Akitomi (在富) | rank = {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}} | lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|ja|後柏原天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} | family = {{ill|Kamo Asomi clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji clan (Kamo clan)|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = Akitomi, {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}} | spouse = Unknown | children = {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, adopted sons: {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}} }}
'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held the ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Biography == Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀).
In {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1507|ja|1507th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he received the rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=draft|12=draft}}. By {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 ({{ill|1512|ja|1512nd year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 ({{ill|1514|ja|1514th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}}.
In {{ill|Kyōroku|ja|享禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1531|ja|1531st year|12=draft|12=draft}}), Akitomi reached the rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1551|ja|1551st year|12=draft|12=draft}})—a first for his family.
However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=draft|12=draft}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}}

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=draft|12=draft}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}}

{{Cite sources|date=2015th year 10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|sortkey=人1565th year 没}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kadenokōji Akitomi | image = | caption = | period = {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Entoku|ja|延徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 2, {{ill|February 5 (old calendar)|ja|2月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1490|ja|1490th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|February 24|ja|2月24日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | death_date = {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 8, {{ill|August 10 (old calendar)|ja|8月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 4|ja|9月4日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | other_names = Initially Akihide (在秀) → Later Akitomi (在富) | rank = {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}} | lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|ja|後柏原天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} | family = {{ill|Kamo Asomi clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji clan (Kamo clan)|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = Akitomi, {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}} | spouse = Unknown | children = {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, adopted sons: {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}} }}
'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held the ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Biography == Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀).
In {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1507|ja|1507th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he received the rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=draft|12=draft}}. By {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 ({{ill|1512|ja|1512nd year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 ({{ill|1514|ja|1514th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}}.
In {{ill|Kyōroku|ja|享禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1531|ja|1531st year|12=draft|12=draft}}), Akitomi reached the rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1551|ja|1551st year|12=draft|12=draft}})—a first for his family.
However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=draft|12=draft}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

{{Cite sources|date=2015th year 10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|sortkey=人1565th year 没}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kadenokōji Akitomi | image = | caption = | period = {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Entoku|ja|延徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 2, {{ill|February 5 (old calendar)|ja|2月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1490|ja|1490th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|February 24|ja|2月24日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | death_date = {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 8, {{ill|August 10 (old calendar)|ja|8月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 4|ja|9月4日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | other_names = Initially Akihide (在秀) → Later Akitomi (在富) | rank = {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}} | lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|ja|後柏原天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} | family = {{ill|Kamo Asomi clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji clan (Kamo clan)|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = Akitomi, {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}} | spouse = Unknown | children = {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, adopted sons: {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}} }}
'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held the ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|12=draft|12=draft}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Biography == Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀).
In {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1507|ja|1507th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he received the rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=draft|12=draft}}. By {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 ({{ill|1512|ja|1512nd year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 ({{ill|1514|ja|1514th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}}.
In {{ill|Kyōroku|ja|享禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1531|ja|1531st year|12=draft|12=draft}}), Akitomi reached the rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1551|ja|1551st year|12=draft|12=draft}})—a first for his family.
However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=draft|12=draft}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}}

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=draft|12=draft}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}}

{{Cite sources|date=2015th year 10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|sortkey=人1565th year 没}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kadenokōji Akitomi | image = | caption = | period = {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Entoku|ja|延徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 2, {{ill|February 5 (old calendar)|ja|2月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1490|ja|1490th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|February 24|ja|2月24日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | death_date = {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 8, {{ill|August 10 (old calendar)|ja|8月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 4|ja|9月4日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | other_names = Initially Akihide (在秀) → Later Akitomi (在富) | rank = {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}} | lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|ja|後柏原天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} | family = {{ill|Kamo Asomi clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji clan (Kamo clan)|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = Akitomi, {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}} | spouse = Unknown | children = {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, adopted sons: {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}} }}
'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held the ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=draft|12=draft}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Biography == Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀).
In {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1507|ja|1507th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he received the rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=draft|12=draft}}. By {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 ({{ill|1512|ja|1512nd year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 ({{ill|1514|ja|1514th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}}.
In {{ill|Kyōroku|ja|享禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1531|ja|1531st year|12=draft|12=draft}}), Akitomi reached the rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1551|ja|1551st year|12=draft|12=draft}})—a first for his family.
However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=draft|12=draft}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}}

{{Cite sources|date=2015th year 10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|sortkey=人1565th year 没}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kadenokōji Akitomi | image = | caption = | period = {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代 (日本)|12=draft|12=draft}} | birth_date = {{ill|Entoku|ja|延徳|12=draft|12=draft}} 2, {{ill|February 5 (old calendar)|ja|2月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1490|ja|1490th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|February 24|ja|2月24日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | death_date = {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 8, {{ill|August 10 (old calendar)|ja|8月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 4|ja|9月4日|12=draft|12=draft}}) | other_names = Initially Akihide (在秀) → Later Akitomi (在富) | rank = {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}} | lord = {{ill|Emperor Go-Kashiwabara|ja|後柏原天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} → {{ill|Emperor Ōgimachi|ja|正親町天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} | family = {{ill|Kamo Asomi clan|ja|賀茂朝臣氏|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji clan (Kamo clan)|ja|勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|12=draft|12=draft}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} | siblings = Akitomi, {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}} | spouse = Unknown | children = {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, adopted sons: {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}} }}
'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|ja|陰陽師|12=draft|12=draft}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held the ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=draft|12=draft}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=draft|12=draft}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Biography == Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀).
In {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1507|ja|1507th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he received the rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=draft|12=draft}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=draft|12=draft}}. By {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 9 ({{ill|1512|ja|1512nd year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}, and in {{ill|Eishō|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 11 ({{ill|1514|ja|1514th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=draft|12=draft}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=draft|12=draft}}.
In {{ill|Kyōroku|ja|享禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|1531|ja|1531st year|12=draft|12=draft}}), Akitomi reached the rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=draft|12=draft}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|ja|後奈良天皇|12=draft|12=draft}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1536|ja|1536th year|12=draft|12=draft}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1551|ja|1551st year|12=draft|12=draft}})—a first for his family.
However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|ja|永禄|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|1559|ja|1559th year|12=draft|12=draft}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=draft|12=draft}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|ja|キリシタン|12=draft|12=draft}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20th year|12=draft|12=draft}}.
Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ({{ill|1565|ja|1565th year|12=draft|12=draft}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
== Lineage == * Father: {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=draft|12=draft}} * Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=draft|12=draft}} * Spouse: Unknown * Children: ** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=draft|12=draft}} (1519/1520–1599) * Adopted children: ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=draft|12=draft}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=draft|12=draft}}) ** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=draft|12=draft}}

revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2015年10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|ソートキー=人1565年没}} {{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 勘解由小路在富 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]] | 生誕 = [[延徳]]2年[[2月5日 (旧暦)|2月5日]]（[[1490年]][[2月24日]]） | 死没 = [[永禄]]8年[[8月10日 (旧暦)|8月10日]]（[[1565年]][[9月4日]]） | 改名 = 在秀（初名）→在富 | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[正二位]]・[[非参議]]、[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]]、[[宮内省 (律令制)|宮内卿]] | 主君 = [[後柏原天皇]]→[[後奈良天皇]]→[[正親町天皇]] | 氏族 = [[賀茂朝臣氏]][[嫡流]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]] | 父母 = 父：[[勘解由小路在重]]、母：[[町顕郷]]娘 | 兄弟 = '''在富'''、[[勘解由小路在康|在康]] | 妻 = | 子 = '''[[賀茂在昌|在昌]]'''、養子：''[[勘解由小路在種|在種]]''、養嗣子：'''''[[勘解由小路在高|在高]]''''' | 特記事項 = }} '''勘解由小路 在富'''（かでのこうじ/かげゆのこうじ あきとみ/ありとみ{{efn2|[[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の[[諱#通字|通字]]「在」は「あき」と読むのが正しいとされる{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=43}}。}}）は、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[公卿]]・[[陰陽師]]。[[従三位]][[非参議]]・[[勘解由小路在重]]の子。[[官位]]は[[正二位]]・[[非参議]]。[[賀茂朝臣氏]][[嫡流]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の事実上の最後の当主。
== 経歴 == 勘解由小路在重の子として誕生。母は[[町顕郷]]の娘。初名は在秀。
[[永正]]4年（[[1507年]]）に[[従五位|従五位下]]・[[兵部省|兵部少輔]]に叙任される。永正9年（[[1512年]]）に[[暦博士]]、永正11年（[[1514年]]）に兼任して[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]]に任命された。以後、[[馬寮|左馬頭]]や[[宮内省 (律令制)|宮内卿]]なども兼務しながら、陰陽頭を[[大永]]2年（[[1522年]]）、暦博士を[[天文 (日本)|天文]]2年（[[1533年]]）まで務めた。この間の[[享禄]]4年（[[1531年]]）には[[従三位]]に昇る。また、大永2年より天文6年（[[1537年]]）まで宮内卿を務め、陰陽師としてだけでなく[[後奈良天皇]]の側近としても活躍した。この功績によって天文5年（[[1536年]]）には[[従二位]]、更に天文20年（[[1551年]]）にはこの家系では初めて[[正二位]]に昇進した。なお、この時期に[[北条氏綱]]を頼って[[相模国]]に下ったものの、天文11年（[[1542年]]）に所領の[[若狭国]][[名田庄村|名田庄]]に退いて陰陽頭としての職務を行わない[[土御門有脩]]に代わって陰陽頭の職務を代行するために呼び戻された。
恐らく[[天文 (元号)|天文]]8年（[[1539年]]）頃（在種はこの年に[[従五位|従五位下]]に叙されている<ref name="tajima-akitane">[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%bc%ef%a1%a7%c9%d4%b6%f8%a4%ce%cd%dc%bb%d2 勘解由小路在種：不遇の養子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>）、弟・[[勘解由小路在康|在康]]の子である[[勘解由小路在種|在種]]を養子としたが、天文20年（[[1551年]]）[[3月14日 (旧暦)|3月14日]]、在種は在富によって「横死」させられた<ref name="tajima-akitane" />{{efn2|『[[尊卑分脈]]』にある「父卿殺害之」という記述{{Sfn|木場|1985|p=166}}の「父」とは、養父在富ではなく、実父[[勘解由小路在康|在種]]を指す可能性も指摘されている{{Sfn|村山|1981|pp=363f}}。}}。天文22年（[[1553年]]）[[旧暦9月22日|9月22日]]には、在富の妻が[[山科言継]]の三男・鶴松丸（のちの[[薄諸光]]）を養子にしたいと要請したが、断られている{{Sfn|村山|1981|p=364}}<ref name="tajima-akitane" />。但し、その前後には山科言継との関係は良好であり、親密な関係があった<ref name="tajima-tokitsugu">[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%ca%e4%b0%e4%a3%b2%a1%a7%bb%b3%b2%ca%b8%c0%b7%d1 補遺2：山科言継]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>。
唯一の息子である[[賀茂在昌]]は、[[永禄]]2年（[[1559年]]）、[[ガスパル・ヴィレラ]]らの上洛の折に[[キリシタン]]となり{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=38}}、永禄7年（[[1564年]]）には妻子を連れて京を出奔して、西洋[[天文学]]を学ぶため[[府内 (豊後国)|豊後府内]]に留学した{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|pp=39f}}。在富は後継者が不在のまま、翌永禄8年（[[1565年]]）[[8月10日 (旧暦)|8月10日]]死去。
没後には嗣子がなかなか決まらず、[[阿倍氏#陰陽道安倍氏|安倍氏]][[嫡流]][[土御門家#土御門家（安倍氏）|土御門家]]から[[土御門有春]]の子である[[勘解由小路在高|在高]]を<ref name="tajima-akitaka">[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%b9%e2 勘解由小路在高]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>、さらにその没後は続いて[[土御門有脩]]の子である[[土御門久脩]]（勘解由小路在綱として改姓改名）を養子に入れて<ref name="tajima-akitsuna">[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%b9%cb 勘解由小路在綱]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>辛うじて存続したものの衰退。[[キリシタン]]となって[[府内 (豊後国)|豊後府内]]に留学していた在富の息子[[賀茂在昌]]が[[安土桃山時代]][[天正]]5年（[[1577年]]）に帰洛して[[陰陽頭]]を嗣いだことによって一旦は相続問題解消したと思われたが、[[江戸時代]]初期、[[賀茂在昌]]の息子と思われる[[勘解由小路在信]]<ref name="tajima-akinobu">[[#tajima| 但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%bf%ae%a1%a7%c2%e8%c6%f3%a4%ce%c2%a9%bb%d2 勘解由小路在信：第二の息子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>の代に至って消息不明となり断絶した。
在富の息子と孫に当たると思われる[[賀茂在昌]]、[[勘解由小路在信]]については不明な点が多く、在富の代で賀茂氏勘解由小路家は実質絶家したものと見なされることが多い。
== 系譜 == *父：勘解由小路在重 *母：町顕郷娘 *妻：不詳 **男子：[[賀茂在昌]]（1520/1519-1599） *養子 **男子：勘解由小路在種 - 勘解由小路在康の子 **男子：勘解由小路在高
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|30em}}
== 参考文献 == * {{オープンアクセス}}{{citation|和書|last=海老沢|first=有道|author-link=海老沢有道 |title=マノエル・アキマサと賀茂在昌|date=1965-03|url=https://doi.org/10.14992/00001009 |journal=史苑 |ISSN=03869318 |publisher=立教大学 |volume=25 |issue=3 |pages=37-46 |doi=10.14992/00001009 |ref={{harvid|海老沢|1965}}}} * {{citation|和書|last=木場|first=明志|title=暦道賀茂家断絶の事―永禄～文禄期 宮廷陰陽道の動向|editor=北西弘先生還暦記念会|publisher=吉川弘文館|journal=中世社会と一向一揆|year=1985|isbn=4642026126}}</cite>（所載：{{citation|和書|editor=村山修一他|title=陰陽道叢書2中世|publisher=名著出版|year=1993|isbn=4626017983}}） * <cite id="tajima">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%c0%ef%b9%f1%bb%fe%c2%e5%a4%ce%b1%a2%cd%db%bb%d5%a1%a7%b2%ec%cc%d0%ba%df%be%bb|author=但馬荒人|title=戦国時代の陰陽師：賀茂在昌|accessdate=2019-10-6}}</cite>{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}} * {{citation|和書|last=村山|first=修一|title=日本陰陽道史総説|publisher=塙書房|year=1981|isbn=4827310572}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:かてのこうし あきとみ}} [[Category:勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|あきとみ]] [[Category:室町・安土桃山時代の公家]] [[Category:陰陽師]] [[Category:正二位受位者]] [[Category:1490年生]] [[Category:1565年没]]

revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2015年10月1日 (木) 04:01 (UTC)|ソートキー=人1565年没}} {{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 勘解由小路在富 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]] | 生誕 = [[延徳]]2年[[2月5日 (旧暦)|2月5日]]（[[1490年]][[2月24日]]） | 死没 = [[永禄]]8年[[8月10日 (旧暦)|8月10日]]（[[1565年]][[9月4日]]） | 改名 = 在秀（初名）→在富 | 別名 = | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = [[正二位]]・[[非参議]]、[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]]、[[宮内省 (律令制)|宮内卿]] | 主君 = [[後柏原天皇]]→[[後奈良天皇]]→[[正親町天皇]] | 氏族 = [[賀茂朝臣氏]][[嫡流]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]] | 父母 = 父：[[勘解由小路在重]]、母：[[町顕郷]]娘 | 兄弟 = '''在富'''、[[勘解由小路在康|在康]] | 妻 = | 子 = '''[[賀茂在昌|在昌]]'''、養子：''[[勘解由小路在種|在種]]''、養嗣子：'''''[[勘解由小路在高|在高]]''''' | 特記事項 = }} '''勘解由小路 在富'''（かでのこうじ/かげゆのこうじ あきとみ/ありとみ{{efn2|[[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の[[諱#通字|通字]]「在」は「あき」と読むのが正しいとされる{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=43}}。}}）は、[[戦国時代 (日本)|戦国時代]]の[[公卿]]・[[陰陽師]]。[[従三位]][[非参議]]・[[勘解由小路在重]]の子。[[官位]]は[[正二位]]・[[非参議]]。[[賀茂朝臣氏]][[嫡流]][[勘解由小路家 (賀茂氏)|勘解由小路家]]の事実上の最後の当主。
== 経歴 == 勘解由小路在重の子として誕生。母は[[町顕郷]]の娘。初名は在秀。
[[永正]]4年（[[1507年]]）に[[従五位|従五位下]]・[[兵部省|兵部少輔]]に叙任される。永正9年（[[1512年]]）に[[暦博士]]、永正11年（[[1514年]]）に兼任して[[陰陽寮|陰陽頭]]に任命された。以後、[[馬寮|左馬頭]]や[[宮内省 (律令制)|宮内卿]]なども兼務しながら、陰陽頭を[[大永]]2年（[[1522年]]）、暦博士を[[天文 (日本)|天文]]2年（[[1533年]]）まで務めた。この間の[[享禄]]4年（[[1531年]]）には[[従三位]]に昇る。また、大永2年より天文6年（[[1537年]]）まで宮内卿を務め、陰陽師としてだけでなく[[後奈良天皇]]の側近としても活躍した。この功績によって天文5年（[[1536年]]）には[[従二位]]、更に天文20年（[[1551年]]）にはこの家系では初めて[[正二位]]に昇進した。なお、この時期に[[北条氏綱]]を頼って[[相模国]]に下ったものの、天文11年（[[1542年]]）に所領の[[若狭国]][[名田庄村|名田庄]]に退いて陰陽頭としての職務を行わない[[土御門有脩]]に代わって陰陽頭の職務を代行するために呼び戻された。
恐らく[[天文 (元号)|天文]]8年（[[1539年]]）頃（在種はこの年に[[従五位|従五位下]]に叙されている<ref name="tajima-akitane">[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%bc%ef%a1%a7%c9%d4%b6%f8%a4%ce%cd%dc%bb%d2 勘解由小路在種：不遇の養子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>）、弟・[[勘解由小路在康|在康]]の子である[[勘解由小路在種|在種]]を養子としたが、天文20年（[[1551年]]）[[3月14日 (旧暦)|3月14日]]、在種は在富によって「横死」させられた<ref name="tajima-akitane" />{{efn2|『[[尊卑分脈]]』にある「父卿殺害之」という記述{{Sfn|木場|1985|p=166}}の「父」とは、養父在富ではなく、実父[[勘解由小路在康|在種]]を指す可能性も指摘されている{{Sfn|村山|1981|pp=363f}}。}}。天文22年（[[1553年]]）[[旧暦9月22日|9月22日]]には、在富の妻が[[山科言継]]の三男・鶴松丸（のちの[[薄諸光]]）を養子にしたいと要請したが、断られている{{Sfn|村山|1981|p=364}}<ref name="tajima-akitane" />。但し、その前後には山科言継との関係は良好であり、親密な関係があった<ref name="tajima-tokitsugu">[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%ca%e4%b0%e4%a3%b2%a1%a7%bb%b3%b2%ca%b8%c0%b7%d1 補遺2：山科言継]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>。
唯一の息子である[[賀茂在昌]]は、[[永禄]]2年（[[1559年]]）、[[ガスパル・ヴィレラ]]らの上洛の折に[[キリシタン]]となり{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|p=38}}、永禄7年（[[1564年]]）には妻子を連れて京を出奔して、西洋[[天文学]]を学ぶため[[府内 (豊後国)|豊後府内]]に留学した{{Sfn|海老沢|1965|pp=39f}}。在富は後継者が不在のまま、翌永禄8年（[[1565年]]）[[8月10日 (旧暦)|8月10日]]死去。
没後には嗣子がなかなか決まらず、[[阿倍氏#陰陽道安倍氏|安倍氏]][[嫡流]][[土御門家#土御門家（安倍氏）|土御門家]]から[[土御門有春]]の子である[[勘解由小路在高|在高]]を<ref name="tajima-akitaka">[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%b9%e2 勘解由小路在高]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>、さらにその没後は続いて[[土御門有脩]]の子である[[土御門久脩]]（勘解由小路在綱として改姓改名）を養子に入れて<ref name="tajima-akitsuna">[[#tajima|但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%b9%cb 勘解由小路在綱]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>辛うじて存続したものの衰退。[[キリシタン]]となって[[府内 (豊後国)|豊後府内]]に留学していた在富の息子[[賀茂在昌]]が[[安土桃山時代]][[天正]]5年（[[1577年]]）に帰洛して[[陰陽頭]]を嗣いだことによって一旦は相続問題解消したと思われたが、[[江戸時代]]初期、[[賀茂在昌]]の息子と思われる[[勘解由小路在信]]<ref name="tajima-akinobu">[[#tajima| 但馬荒人]] - [https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%b4%aa%b2%f2%cd%b3%be%ae%cf%a9%ba%df%bf%ae%a1%a7%c2%e8%c6%f3%a4%ce%c2%a9%bb%d2 勘解由小路在信：第二の息子]{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}}</ref>の代に至って消息不明となり断絶した。
在富の息子と孫に当たると思われる[[賀茂在昌]]、[[勘解由小路在信]]については不明な点が多く、在富の代で賀茂氏勘解由小路家は実質絶家したものと見なされることが多い。
== 系譜 == *父：勘解由小路在重 *母：町顕郷娘 *妻：不詳 **男子：[[賀茂在昌]]（1520/1519-1599） *養子 **男子：勘解由小路在種 - 勘解由小路在康の子 **男子：勘解由小路在高
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Notelist2}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|30em}}
== 参考文献 == * {{オープンアクセス}}{{citation|和書|last=海老沢|first=有道|author-link=海老沢有道 |title=マノエル・アキマサと賀茂在昌|date=1965-03|url=https://doi.org/10.14992/00001009 |journal=史苑 |ISSN=03869318 |publisher=立教大学 |volume=25 |issue=3 |pages=37-46 |doi=10.14992/00001009 |ref={{harvid|海老沢|1965}}}} * {{citation|和書|last=木場|first=明志|title=暦道賀茂家断絶の事―永禄～文禄期 宮廷陰陽道の動向|editor=北西弘先生還暦記念会|publisher=吉川弘文館|journal=中世社会と一向一揆|year=1985|isbn=4642026126}}</cite>（所載：{{citation|和書|editor=村山修一他|title=陰陽道叢書2中世|publisher=名著出版|year=1993|isbn=4626017983}}） * <cite id="tajima">{{Cite web|和書|url=https://seesaawiki.jp/consume_mind/d/%c0%ef%b9%f1%bb%fe%c2%e5%a4%ce%b1%a2%cd%db%bb%d5%a1%a7%b2%ec%cc%d0%ba%df%be%bb|author=但馬荒人|title=戦国時代の陰陽師：賀茂在昌|accessdate=2019-10-6}}</cite>{{信頼性要検証|date=2022-1}} * {{citation|和書|last=村山|first=修一|title=日本陰陽道史総説|publisher=塙書房|year=1981|isbn=4827310572}}

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and [[:en:Onmyōji|Onmyōji]] of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|qq=|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4 ([[:en:1507|1507]]), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of the Military|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 9 ([[:en:1512|1512]]), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 11 ([[:en:1514|1514]]), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In [[:en:Kyōroku|Kyōroku]] 4 ([[:en:1531|1531]]), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]], he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1536|1536]]), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ([[:en:1551|1551]])—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 2 ([[:en:1559|1559]]) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|qq=|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]]. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1565|1565]]). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and [[:en:Onmyōji|Onmyōji]] of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|qq=|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4 ([[:en:1507|1507]]), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of the Military|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 9 ([[:en:1512|1512]]), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 11 ([[:en:1514|1514]]), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In [[:en:Kyōroku|Kyōroku]] 4 ([[:en:1531|1531]]), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]], he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1536|1536]]), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ([[:en:1551|1551]])—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 2 ([[:en:1559|1559]]) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|qq=|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]]. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1565|1565]]). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and [[:en:Onmyōji|Onmyōji]] of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|qq=|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4 ([[:en:1507|1507]]), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of the Military|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 9 ([[:en:1512|1512]]), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 11 ([[:en:1514|1514]]), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In [[:en:Kyōroku|Kyōroku]] 4 ([[:en:1531|1531]]), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]], he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1536|1536]]), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ([[:en:1551|1551]])—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 2 ([[:en:1559|1559]]) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|qq=|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]]. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1565|1565]]). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and [[:en:Onmyōji|Onmyōji]] of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4 ([[:en:1507|1507]]), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of the Military|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 9 ([[:en:1512|1512]]), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 11 ([[:en:1514|1514]]), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In [[:en:Kyōroku|Kyōroku]] 4 ([[:en:1531|1531]]), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]], he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1536|1536]]), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ([[:en:1551|1551]])—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 2 ([[:en:1559|1559]]) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]]. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1565|1565]]). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and [[:en:Onmyōji|Onmyōji]] of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 4 ([[:en:1507|1507]]), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of the Military|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 9 ([[:en:1512|1512]]), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] 11 ([[:en:1514|1514]]), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In [[:en:Kyōroku|Kyōroku]] 4 ([[:en:1531|1531]]), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to [[:en:Emperor Go-Nara|Emperor Go-Nara]], he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1536|1536]]), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ([[:en:1551|1551]])—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in [[:en:Eiroku|Eiroku]] 2 ([[:en:1559|1559]]) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a [[:en:Kirishitan|Kirishitan]]. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:1565|1565]]). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.
