'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|WD=Q2274163|lt=Onmyōji}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 4 ({{ill|1507|en|1507|WD=Q6161|lt=1507}}), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of the Military|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 9 ({{ill|1512|en|1512|WD=Q6192|lt=1512}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 11 ({{ill|1514|en|1514|WD=Q6204|lt=1514}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|WD=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku}} 4 ({{ill|1531|en|1531|WD=Q6431|lt=1531}}), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Emperor Go-Nara}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1536|en|1536|WD=Q6457|lt=1536}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ({{ill|1551|en|1551|WD=Q6560|lt=1551}})—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 2 ({{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|WD=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|WD=Q2274163|lt=Onmyōji}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 4 ({{ill|1507|en|1507|WD=Q6161|lt=1507}}), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of the Military|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 9 ({{ill|1512|en|1512|WD=Q6192|lt=1512}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} 11 ({{ill|1514|en|1514|WD=Q6204|lt=1514}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|WD=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku}} 4 ({{ill|1531|en|1531|WD=Q6431|lt=1531}}), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Emperor Go-Nara}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1536|en|1536|WD=Q6457|lt=1536}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ({{ill|1551|en|1551|WD=Q6560|lt=1551}})—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku}} 2 ({{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|WD=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

== Lineage ==

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|WD=Q2274163|lt=Onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 4 ({{ill|1507|en|1507|WD=Q6161|lt=1507|1=1507}}), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 9 ({{ill|1512|en|1512|WD=Q6192|lt=1512|1=1512}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 11 ({{ill|1514|en|1514|WD=Q6204|lt=1514|1=1514}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|WD=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku|1=Kyōroku}} 4 ({{ill|1531|en|1531|WD=Q6431|lt=1531|1=1531}}), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Emperor Go-Nara|1=Emperor Go-Nara}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1536|en|1536|WD=Q6457|lt=1536|1=1536}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ({{ill|1551|en|1551|WD=Q6560|lt=1551|1=1551}})—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 2 ({{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|WD=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan|1=Kirishitan}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

* Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* Spouse: Unknown
* Children:
** {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}} (1519/1520–1599)
* Adopted children:
** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja|勘解由小路在康|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arikazu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}})
** {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja|勘解由小路在高|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitaka|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|WD=Q2274163|lt=Onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 4 ({{ill|1507|en|1507|WD=Q6161|lt=1507|1=1507}}), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 9 ({{ill|1512|en|1512|WD=Q6192|lt=1512|1=1512}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 11 ({{ill|1514|en|1514|WD=Q6204|lt=1514|1=1514}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|WD=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku|1=Kyōroku}} 4 ({{ill|1531|en|1531|WD=Q6431|lt=1531|1=1531}}), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Emperor Go-Nara|1=Emperor Go-Nara}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1536|en|1536|WD=Q6457|lt=1536|1=1536}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ({{ill|1551|en|1551|WD=Q6560|lt=1551|1=1551}})—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 2 ({{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|WD=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan|1=Kirishitan}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|WD=Q2274163|lt=Onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 4 ({{ill|1507|en|1507|WD=Q6161|lt=1507|1=1507}}), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3276048}}. By {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 9 ({{ill|1512|en|1512|WD=Q6192|lt=1512|1=1512}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 11 ({{ill|1514|en|1514|WD=Q6204|lt=1514|1=1514}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q8193428}}.

In {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|WD=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku|1=Kyōroku}} 4 ({{ill|1531|en|1531|WD=Q6431|lt=1531|1=1531}}), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|WD=Q349467|lt=Emperor Go-Nara|1=Emperor Go-Nara}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1536|en|1536|WD=Q6457|lt=1536|1=1536}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}} ({{ill|1551|en|1551|WD=Q6560|lt=1551|1=1551}})—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|WD=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 2 ({{ill|1559|en|1559|WD=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11486078}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|WD=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan|1=Kirishitan}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1565|en|1565|WD=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

'''Kadenokōji Akitomi''' (勘解由小路 在富) was a noble and {{ill|Onmyōji|en|Onmyōji|qid=Q2274163|lt=Onmyōji|1=Onmyōji}} of the {{ill|Sengoku period (Japan)|ja|戦国時代|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku period (Japan)|1=Sengoku Period (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q117415390}}. He held the Ranks of {{ill|Shōni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} and {{ill|Hisanagi|ja|非参議|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hisanagi|qq=}}, and served as the head of the {{ill|Onmyōryō|ja|陰陽寮|1=Yin-Yang Bureau|2=ja|3=陰陽寮|4=fr|5=Bureau d'Onmyō|6=zh|7=阴阳寮|8=ko|9=음양료|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyōryō|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Bureau|qq=}}. Born as the son of {{ill|Kadenokōji Arishige|ja|勘解由小路在重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Arishige|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, he was the last effective head of the {{ill|Kadenokōji family|ja|勘解由小路家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji family|qq=}}.

== Biography ==
Born to Kadenokōji Arishige and a daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Akitomi was initially named Akihide (在秀). 

In {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 4 ({{ill|1507|en|1507|qid=Q6161|lt=1507|1=1507}}), he received the Rank of {{ill|Jugoi|ja|従五位下|1=Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jugoi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 従五位}} and was appointed {{ill|Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja|兵部少輔|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbu Shōsuke|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 兵部省|1=Ministry of War (pre-modern Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3276048}}. By {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 9 ({{ill|1512|en|1512|qid=Q6192|lt=1512|1=1512}}), he became {{ill|Reki Hakase|ja|暦博士|lt=Doctor of Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reki Hakase|qq=}}, and in {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 11 ({{ill|1514|en|1514|qid=Q6204|lt=1514|1=1514}}), he was also appointed {{ill|Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Yin-Yang Bureau|lt=Onmyō no kami|ja|陰陽頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onmyō no kami|qq=}}. He held multiple concurrent roles, including {{ill|Meryō|lt=Head of the Meryō|ja|左馬頭|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meryō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 馬寮}} and {{ill|Kunaikyō|ja|宮内卿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunaikyō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宮内省|1=Ministry of the Imperial Household|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8193428}}.

In {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|qid=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku|1=Kyōroku}} 4 ({{ill|1531|en|1531|qid=Q6431|lt=1531|1=1531}}), Akitomi reached the Rank of {{ill|Shōsanmi|ja|従三位|1=Junior Third Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōsanmi|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Third Rank|qq=}}. For his close service to {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|qid=Q349467|lt=Emperor Go-Nara|1=Emperor Go-Nara}}, he was promoted to {{ill|Shōni|ja|従二位|1=Junior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōni|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 5|ja|天文5年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 5|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1536|en|1536|qid=Q6457|lt=1536|1=1536}}), and later to {{ill|Seoni|ja|正二位|1=Senior Second Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seoni|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Second Rank|qq=}} in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6560}} ({{ill|1551|en|1551|qid=Q6560|lt=1551|1=1551}})—a first for his family.

However, his sole son, {{ill|Kamo Akimasa|ja|賀茂在昌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamo Akimasa|qq=}}, fled Kyoto in {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 2 ({{ill|1559|en|1559|qid=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}}) to study Western astronomy in {{ill|Funai|ja|府内 (豊後国)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funai|1=Funai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11486078}} and became a {{ill|Kirishitan|en|Kirishitan|qid=Q718714|lt=Kirishitan|1=Kirishitan}}. Left without a direct heir, Akitomi adopted {{ill|Kadenokōji Akitane|ja|勘解由小路在種|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kadenokōji Akitane|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, but their relationship ended in tragedy when Akitane was killed in {{ill|Tenbun 20|ja|天文20年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun 20|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 1551年|1=1551|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q6560}}. 

Akitomi passed away on {{ill|Eiroku 8|ja|永禄8年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eiroku 8|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|1565|en|1565|qid=Q6634|lt=1565|1=1565}}). The Kadenokōji clan faced further decline, leading to its eventual extinction.

* Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Machi Akiyuki|ja|町顕郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Machi Akiyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
